rulings.Case Title: 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST VS. AIRBNB, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 24, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED as to all causes of action, with leave to amend, if in good faith Plaintiff can allege and/or address the following issues: *Plaintiff's ability to sue as a trust; *Defendant's immunity under the Communications Decency Act; *1st cause of action for intentional interference with a contract: 2-year statute of limitation; *2nd cause of action for fraud: 3-year statute of limitation; facts alleging reliance and causation; *3rd cause of action for UCL violations: fraudulent, unlawful, or unfair conduct under the UCL; *4th cause of action for declaratory relief: existence of a contract between the parties; *5th cause of action injunctive relief: existence of on-going conduct; *6th cause of action for accounting: existence of a relationship between the parties; *7th cause of action for equitable indemnity: loss due to liability. = (501/REQ)
